message:
feat(fsqlite-harness): add supervision tree, two-phase commit tests, and consolidate MVCC verification (bd-3go.5, bd-3go.10, bd-27nu)

Supervision tree (supervision.rs, new):
- Implement OTP-style supervision tree with service enums (WriteCoordinator,
  SymbolStore, Replicator, CheckpointerGc, IntegritySweeper)
- Add outcome classification (Ok, Err, Panicked, Cancelled) with decision engine
  applying INV-SUPERVISION-MONOTONE: Panicked→Stop/Escalate, Cancelled→Stop,
  transient Err→Restart with budget limits
- Include resilience combinators: circuit breaker, bulkhead, rate limiter, retry
- Add Supervised<S> wrapper and DbRootSupervisor with 30+ unit tests

Two-phase commit pipeline tests (new):
- commit_pipeline_two_phase.rs: tests for reserve/abort/send, occupancy tracking,
  blocking at capacity, cancel safety, FIFO ordering, leak detection, batch sizing
- e2e_commit_pipeline_cancel_safety.rs: 40-writer concurrent test with cancellation
  during reserve (10), after send (5), and normal commits (25); validates FIFO
  delivery and full capacity recovery

TLA+ specification refinements (tla.rs):
- Consolidate redundant invariants and streamline formal MVCC model
- Remove deprecated specification patterns from earlier iterations

MVCC verification consolidation (mvcc_alien_verification.rs):
- Replace legacy alien verification tests with invariant-based approach
- Significant cleanup removing 680 lines of superseded test infrastructure

Eprocess and trace monoid updates:
- Minor eprocess module refinements
- Small improvements to trace monoid composition

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
